scope: Durable append-only audit-log integration vectors for real producers: sync RBAC, command RBAC, permission changes, secrets, network egress, lifecycle purge, signing refusal, queries, append-only replay, and deterministic timestamps.

row_shape.audit_id: stable row id minted from append sequence
row_shape.logical_time: event-sink logical timestamp or externally supplied replay clock
row_shape.producer: subsystem that emitted the audit row
row_shape.actor_id: authenticated actor responsible for the decision
row_shape.resource_type: record, schema, command, capability, secret, network, applet, package, or audit_log
row_shape.metadata: redacted structured context; no secret values, request bodies, or response bodies

decisions.redaction: secret values and network bodies are never persisted in audit metadata; secret audit rows carry secret_ref ids only.
decisions.deterministic_time: audit persistence uses append sequence plus logical_time from EventSink or an externally supplied replay clock; wall clock is metadata only when explicitly supplied and recorded.
decisions.append_only: re-running a producer appends new rows with new seq/audit_id values and never mutates prior audit rows.
